data.text/markdown:
Josiah Barry | Data Analytics Portfolio

About Me

Hi, I'm Josiah Barry, a student studying data analytics. This portfolio showcases my ability to work with real financial data using Python, Marimo, and data visualisation tools.

Project Overview

This dashboard analyses Apple Inc. (AAPL) stock data, exploring price trends, trading volume, and key financial metrics using interactive visualisations.
